finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_13.md:83; chapters/chapter_13.md:91; chapters/chapter_13.md:105; chapters/chapter_13.md:119; chapters/chapter_13.md:145; chapters/chapter_13.md:191; chapters/chapter_13.md:213; chapters/chapter_13.md:227
finding_results.notes: Reworked the confrontation so Vel's answers repeatedly trigger Kem-local processing: arithmetic recoil, bodily hum, memory collision, recognition of the delayed disclosure, and re-reading of earlier care as mixed motive. The reveal no longer runs in extended exterior-only dialogue blocks.
Removed the repeated 'softness-to-callus / no-longer-Vault-hands' realization. The callus now functions as physical friction on the pack strap and later splits during the grain-shed labor.

Expanded the chapter to 7127 words by adding two consequential post-reveal sequences: the grain-shed salvage scene and the weigh-station/night-walk sequence. The added material increases pressure, proves the fractured alliance in action, and preserves the Chapter 14 handoff.

Four edits across the confrontation zone. (1) Line 111: replaced narrator-admiring metaphor ('nail driven through thin wood') with a physical reaction ('Kem's hands stopped on the floorboards') that does not comment on the dialogue's effectiveness. (2) Line 157: Kem's 'Component' delivery now arrives through a restart and self-correction ('That's the — you know what the word is') instead of a clean drop. (3) Line 161: the too-measured list ('range. Budget. Whether I'd last') replaced with a restart and concrete scene particulars ('you weren't seeing — you were counting. How far I could drop. How many levels I had to spend on your door'). (4) Line 175: broken into two speech acts with a physical beat between them; 'You spend forty years' inverted to 'Forty years you spent' for pressured syntax, ending on the concrete 'How much I'm worth to the crossing' instead of the clean landing 'It's what I can burn.' (5) Line 187: the abstract equivalence ending ('You recruited me as a component. That's what they do here. You replicated the same system you claim to oppose') replaced with concrete road callbacks (the farmer, the camp, the couple under the cart) and pressure-syntax features: 'Don't — don't' restart, 'to keep him — to keep the supply functional' self-correction where Kem catches himself mid-word and substitutes resource-language for personhood. The accusation now ends on 'Not me. What was left' — concrete and personal rather than systemic-abstract. Three of Kem's longer turns now show pressure on the syntax through restarts, self-corrections, and incomplete first clauses.

finding_results.notes: Compressed the post-notice confrontation so the Hoarded-yield parallel lands once, then each successive beat adds a fresh admission or consequence: Vel concedes the exploitative start, admits the road/basin motives stayed mixed, owns that the restraint lessons were partly budget, answers the relational question with 'Sometimes,' and the scene cashes that damage into Kem's signet removal and the altered walking formation.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 13 now exceeds the minimum word count, threads Kem's interiority through the Vel confrontation, replaces the redundant callus recognition with physical-action beats, and adds consequential no-spend aftermath material that keeps the alliance fractured but intact before Chapter 14.

Roughened the confrontation's four key Kem turns and removed narrator-admiring phrasing. Kem's accusation now arrives through restarts, self-corrections, and concrete road callbacks rather than composed mini-speeches and abstract equivalence sentences. The moral force of the accusation is preserved — the Margins connection still lands through the notice-pointing at line 181 and the 'component' label at line 157 — but the speech sounds like anger working its way out under pressure rather than authored lines designed to land cleanly.

Revised the farmhouse confrontation to remove repeated thematic self-translation after the labor notice. The scene now escalates through new facts, concessions, and consequences while preserving the chapter's betrayal state shift, signet beat, and fractured-but-intact alliance.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=5, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
